name: Iterators.Generators.Arrays

documentation.description:
To avoid duplication of generic profile, and allow use with anonymous
arrays, we require users to cast their arrays to one of the named type
herein:

array_types.name: Element_Array
array_types.code: type Element_Array is array (Any_Index range <>) of aliased Any_Element;

subprograms.name: Const_Iter
subprograms.code: function Const_Iter (C : aliased Element_Array) return Root.Iterator'Class

subprograms.name: Iter
subprograms.code: function Iter (C : aliased in out Element_Array) return Root.Iterator'Class

formals.name: Root
formals.code: with package Root is new Iterators.Root (Any_Element => Any_Element);
